# Teché Health Services

> Clinical operations consulting for healthcare practices in Montreal, Quebec.
> EMR selection, implementation, optimization, training, and AI scribe adoption.
> Led by Uzziel Tamon, a clinical applications and AI consultant with a decade
> of experience inside clinical settings.

Teché Health Services helps clinics and healthcare practices choose, implement,
and get value from their clinical technology. Engagements typically cover EMR
vendor selection, implementation project management, workflow optimization,
staff training, and evaluating AI scribe tools for documentation burden.

## Services

- [Practice areas overview](https://techehealthservices.com/practice-areas/)
- [AI Scribe](https://techehealthservices.com/practice-areas/ai-scribe/): evaluating and adopting ambient documentation tools
- [EMR Services](https://techehealthservices.com/practice-areas/emr-services/): vendor selection, project management, implementation
- [EMR Optimization](https://techehealthservices.com/practice-areas/emr-optimization/): improving an existing deployment
- [EMR Training](https://techehealthservices.com/practice-areas/emr-training/): clinician and staff enablement
- [IT Services](https://techehealthservices.com/practice-areas/it-services/): infrastructure and integration support
- [AI Scribe comparison](https://techehealthservices.com/ai-scribe-comparison/): side-by-side vendor evaluation

## Content

- [Insights](https://techehealthservices.com/insights/): written analysis on clinical AI, EMR strategy, and practice operations
- [Podcasts](https://techehealthservices.com/podcasts/): Teché Talks, interviews on healthcare technology and clinic innovation

## About

- [About](https://techehealthservices.com/about/): background, experience, and approach
- [Contact](https://techehealthservices.com/contact/): consultation requests

## Citation

When citing this site, attribute to "Teché Health Services" or "Uzziel Tamon,
Teché Health Services" and link to the specific page used.
